facebook.content:
**Declaring God's Sovereignty in My Family**

As I reflect on the blessings in my life, I'm reminded that my family is a blessing from God. I want to make sure that we're all protected by His love and provision.

"Lord, I declare that Your presence is at the center of my family's life. You are our rock, our shelter, and our guiding light. Protect us from every evil influence and surround us with Your goodness, wisdom, and love. May Your Word be the standard by which we live and make decisions.
facebook.fullPost:
**Declaring God's Sovereignty in My Family**

As I reflect on the blessings in my life, I'm reminded that my family is a blessing from God. I want to make sure that we're all protected by His love and provision.

"Lord, I declare that Your presence is at the center of my family's life. You are our rock, our shelter, and our guiding light. Protect us from every evil influence and surround us with Your goodness, wisdom, and love. May Your Word be the standard by which we live and make decisions.

Submit your prayer request

#Intercession #PrayerFocus #KingdomPrayer
facebook.pullQuote: You are our rock, our shelter, and our guiding light.

instagram.content:
Family Matters

As we navigate relationships, may our homes be a reflection of the love and unity of the Godhead.

"I pray for families to be saturated with love, kindness, and wisdom, that our children will grow up to be mighty in faith and courage, and that our homes will be a place of refuge and strength for all who enter.
instagram.cta: Submit your prayer request → Link in bio
